market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Spot hovering just above 0DTE gamma flip. Break below 576.28 triggers short-gamma acceleration. Negative GEX in weekly/monthly amplifies downside volatility.
outlook.summary: Price at 577.11 sits precariously above the critical 576.28 gamma flip. The bearish smirk skew across all expiries (ratio 1.30-1.41) and negative weekly/monthly GEX indicate structural weakness. Extreme hedging volume at 565 PUT (62.5x VOL/OI) and Max Pain at 566 create strong magnetic pull downward. Dealers will defend 576.28; failure triggers cascading hedging flows.

levels.motivazione: Critical 0DTE gamma equilibrium. Spot at 577.11 is barely 0.14% above. Dealers flip from long to short gamma here. Break below triggers accelerated selling as dealers hedge negative exposure.
Extreme volume anomaly: 289,514 contracts traded vs 4,633 OI (62.5x ratio). Largest single-strike hedging flow in dataset. Institutional protective buying creates magnetic support zone.
RESONANCE across all expiries. Monthly shows 39,558 CALL OI + 38,271 PUT OI. Psychological century mark. Dealers sold heavy calls, will suppress rallies toward 600.
RESONANCE structural floor. Monthly 32,296 PUT OI, Weekly 7,491, 0DTE 12,468. Deep support where dealers accumulate long delta hedges. Break would signal regime change.
CONFLUENCE in Weekly (12,955 OI) and Monthly (30,914 OI). Above spot creates dealer short-put hedging pressure. Rallies toward 580 will be sold into.
0DTE max pain aligned with extreme 565 volume zone. 1.9% below spot. Market maker optimal expiry target. Strong magnetic attraction for intraday price action.
Dominant 0DTE call wall with 34,519 OI. Primary intraday resistance. Dealers will actively suppress price advances toward this strike through delta hedging.
High-activity 0DTE put wall: 15,556 OI with 129,321 volume (8.3x ratio). Secondary support zone with significant dealer gamma exposure. Monthly confluence adds structural weight.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected - positive GEX (0.46B net) suppresses movement near Max Pain equilibrium
outlook.summary: Market pinned at critical equilibrium between Max Pain (23880) and Gamma Flip (23872). Elevated 0DTE PCR (2.35) indicates hedging pressure, but extreme VOL/OI ratios in nearby CALLs (23800 at 24x) suggest intraday bullish speculation. Positive aggregate GEX stabilizes price action. Break direction depends on 24300 resistance or 23200 support test.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain within 0.1% of spot creates powerful magnetic pull for expiration pin risk
Multi-expiry CALL confluence (WEEKLY 471 + MONTHLY 412 OI) aligned with MONTHLY Max Pain - major resistance
Multi-expiry PUT confluence (0DTE 563 + MONTHLY 112 OI) creates structural support floor
0DTE gamma equilibrium - spot testing from above determines dealer hedging direction
Extreme VOL/OI ratio (24x) in 0DTE CALLs indicates massive intraday speculative activity
WEEKLY dominant CALL OI (531) forms secondary resistance above confluence zone
WEEKLY Max Pain alignment with high PUT OI (478) creates support zone
